tool.name: Mac Running Processes
tool.description: List running processes on the Mac with their resource usage.

limit.description: Maximum number of processes to return

ai.systemPromptSection:
### mac_processes
List running processes on the Mac.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool": "mac_processes", "query": "{\"limit\": 20}"}
```

**Parameters:**
- limit: Maximum processes to return (default: 20)

**Returns:** List of processes with pid, name, status (active/running)
whenToUse: Need to see what apps are running
